business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin.

coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage requested for approximately 285 employees across all operations.
Coverage requested for all scheduled locations on a special form with replacement cost valuation.

document_info.prepared_by: Marcus Jennings, Senior Vice President, Capitol Insurance Advisors

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The claims history warrants review; management has implemented corrective measures to address identified exposures. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 38 total claims with 511891.20 in total paid losses and 714517.96 total incurred. Currently, 11 claims remain open and 27 have been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 21.6% (avg annual incurred 142903.59 against current annual premium 660422.75 over 5 loss years). Breakdown by coverage line: Workers' Compensation: 28 claims, 324545.30 paid, 415934.50 incurred; General Liability: 8 claims, 8779.76 paid, 82656.15 incurred; Commercial Property: 2 claims, 178566.14 paid, 215927.31 incurred. Note: account experienced a cancellation in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group. Reason: Insured cancelled — moved to current carrier.
extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC for your review and consideration. The insured is a boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin, with approximately 16 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Workers' Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Property.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: The insured is a boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin, with approximately 16 years of operating history.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: The insured carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements. An employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative have been in place for over five years. A comprehensive fleet management program with GPS tracking and driver training has been in place since 2023. The insured maintains a dedicated safety committee that meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits. The insured has implemented a formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%. Favorable experience modification factor of 0.94, reflecting a strong loss control program relative to class peers. With 285 employees and a structured HR program, the insured maintains low turnover and consistent safety training.

concerns: Claims history warrants review: 38 total claims, 511891.20 paid, 714517.96 incurred, with 11 claims open.
Account experienced a cancellation in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group; reason stated as insured cancelled and moved to current carrier.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the review period, the insured incurred 38 total claims with 511891.20 paid and 714517.96 incurred; 11 claims remain open and 27 are closed. Annualized loss ratio is 21.6%, based on average annual incurred of 142903.59 against current annual premium of 660422.75 over 5 loss years. By line: Workers' Compensation 28 claims, 324545.30 paid, 415934.50 incurred; General Liability 8 claims, 8779.76 paid, 82656.15 incurred; Commercial Property 2 claims, 178566.14 paid, 215927.31 incurred.
